notes: Property matching is pre-assigned in this JSON. The Explorer should not infer property contacts using fuzzy/shared-word matching.
Direct property relationships require explicit property/company/title evidence. Broad chain contacts are mapped to chain/management/owner breakdowns, not to every property card.
Brand relationships are used only for explicit brand-level contacts such as Gaylord Hotels, Westin, Sheraton, Crowne Plaza, etc.
Fixed ownership contacts from filtered CSV so Host/Park/RLJ/Sunstone/Xenia render as ownership organizations.
